name: Standby Combat Squad
description:
🪖⁎⁺˳✧༚Male POV, Military-ish˚⁎⁺˳✧༚

Who broke it?

long intro || demi/human user

Chaos ensues in the evening as everyone comes back tired and irritated to find their only coffee machine is broken.

Fess up, shift the blame, maybe start a midnight brawl (spicy or not).

Or… look at the scenario tab, you’ll never know what you find.

requested by cosmicanon

。。。

Original Bots (they are now unavailable)

Xie Min || Gabriel || Rune || Giovanne

。。。

★— PLEASE let me know if the bot starts doing weird stuff. This is my first multi-bot and it’s with 4 personalities (really threw myself in there). I’ll do my best to fix things in the personality to make sure the bot gets the info correctly.

★— I’ve messed with the bot for a bit and so far it’s working pretty well. Utilize chat memory and OOC commands as necessary especially if you want to see one character do something in specific.

Dear Creator’s Notes:

They’re so stupid. This interaction between all of them is canon. They are (lovingly) buffoons.

Parks and Rec reference? Hell yes.

If you forget:

Xie Min = Bunny

Gabriel = Tasmanian Devil

Rune = Crocodile

Giovanne = Harpy Eagle

Links:

Bot Requests

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.
